What I Do

End-to-end instructional design,
from the first brief to the final build.

E-Learning Design

Engaging, interactive courses built in Rise 360 and Storyline, designed around how people actually learn.

Scenario-Based Training

Real-world branching scenarios that put learners in the driver's seat and build practical skills.

Research and Needs Analysis

Evidence-based design starts before the first slide. I research, analyse, and plan before I build anything.

AI Video Integration

Bringing learning to life with AI avatars using Synthesia and HeyGen. Professional video without the production cost.

Presentation Design

Visually compelling slide decks and training presentations that communicate clearly and look professionally designed.

My Work

A selection of projects designed end-to-end, from research and storyboarding to the final build. Each project reflects a research-first, learner-centred approach.

Drug and Alcohol Services Australia

Drug and Alcohol Policy Overview for Workers

A compliance module for frontline workers covering their organisation's drug and alcohol policy. Designed for clarity across different literacy levels, with a focus on practical understanding over box-ticking.

Interactive Module

Understanding Your Attachment Style at Work

An interactive tab-based module exploring the four attachment styles in professional settings. Built with clickable tab navigation, illustrated characters, reflection prompts, and a three-question knowledge check with scenario-based questions and personalised results.

Storyline 360PsychologyTab InteractionKnowledge Check
View project →

Interactive Module

Sleep Science: Why You Can't Switch Off

A visually rich, science-based module exploring sleep stages, circadian rhythms, modern sleep disruptors, and evidence-based strategies. Features six different interaction types including a clickable body map, circadian clock hotspots, true/false myth-busting, and a scenario-based knowledge check.

Storyline 360NeuroscienceHotspot InteractionsKnowledge Check
View project →

Life Management Science Labs

Research and Course Development: 52 Courses

Contributed to the research and course development of 52 science-backed courses spanning relationships, psychology, parenting, happiness, productivity, wellbeing, and longevity. Responsibilities included in-depth academic research, learning structure design, and curriculum development, ensuring each course was grounded in evidence and built for practical, real-world application.

Get in Touch

Hi,
I'm Neha

I have a background in psychology and spent 5+ years working in research studying how people think, learn, and change behaviour. That foundation shapes everything I do as an instructional designer.

I discovered instructional design and immediately knew it was the perfect intersection of everything I love: evidence, empathy, and building things that actually work for people.

I design e-learning end-to-end. That means I don't just build slides, I research the problem first, understand the learner, map the content, storyboard the experience, design it visually, develop it in Rise 360 or Storyline, and refine it until it's right.

I also bring AI into my work, where it adds real value. I use tools like Synthesia, HeyGen, and ElevenLabs to create professional videos and voiceovers without the production cost.

I'm based in Pakistan and work remotely with clients globally. If you're looking for someone who takes learning seriously and brings both research rigour and creative design to every project, I'd love to work with you.

I work remotely and am available across multiple time zones, including AEST, GMT, and PKT. Flexible hours available for international clients.

Get in Touch LinkedIn
How I Work

My Process

01

Research

I dig deep before designing, reviewing literature and grounding every decision in evidence. My psychology background means I take this seriously.

02

Analyse

Identify the performance gap, define clear learning objectives, and map out what success looks like for both learner and organisation.

03

Storyboard

Plan the entire learner journey on paper first, content flow, interactions, scenarios, and visual direction, before a single screen is built.

04

Design

Create the visual look and feel: colour, typography, layout, and imagery, ensuring every design choice serves clarity and engagement.

05

Develop

Build the full course in Rise 360 or Storyline, incorporating interactivity, AI-generated video where appropriate, and accessibility best practices.

06

Refine

Gather feedback, iterate, and ensure the final product meets every learning objective and business goal.
